name: Beefy Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lean ground beef and chopped onion, then drain off any excess fat.
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Add the cooked ground beef mixture to the greased casserole dish.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the two cans of cream soup and water until well blended and smooth.
5. Pour the soup mixture over the rice in the casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
7. This recipe serves 6 to 8 people.
